description: Forgemem persistent memory tools for AI agents

setup.description: First-time setup — run these commands in order, no user input required
setup.note: Always use 'forgemem init --yes' — omitting --yes blocks on interactive prompts. After setup, tell the user to restart Codex to activate the MCP connection.

tools.name: forgemem_store
tools.description: Save a memory trace to Forgemem. Use after fixing bugs, completing features, or noticing reusable lessons.

parameters.content: What happened, what worked or failed, include file paths and error messages
parameters.project: repo name (auto-detected from git if omitted)
parameters.distill: true to auto-extract a durable principle

tools.name: forgemem_search
tools.description: Search memory for past learnings, patterns, or failures.

tools.name: forgemem_distill
tools.description: Distill raw traces into durable principles via Claude Haiku. Run at end of session.

tools.name: forgemem_mine
tools.description: Mine all ~/Developer repos for recent git commits and markdown changes, extracting learnings.
